name: items_list
description: List all content records (items) with optional filtering by model type, text search, field values, sorting, and offset-based pagination. Requires the X-Api-Version: 3 header.

parameters.name: filter[type]
parameters.description: Filter by model ID or api_key. Required when using filter[fields] or order_by.

parameters.name: filter[query]
parameters.description: Full-text search query across record fields.

parameters.name: filter[fields]
parameters.description: Field-level filtering using GraphQL-style syntax. Requires filter[type] with a single model.

parameters.name: nested
parameters.description: If true, returns full payload for nested blocks instead of just IDs.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Locale for filtering. Defaults to environment's main locale.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Sort field and direction. Requires filter[type] with single model.

parameters.name: page[limit]
parameters.description: Maximum records per page. Default: 30, max: 500 (30 in nested mode).
